Class AbstractJasperExcelExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExcelExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperIExcelExporter, JasperIExporter, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
JasperOdsExporter, JasperXlsxExporter
public abstract class AbstractJasperExcelExporter extends AbstractJasperExporter implements JasperIExcelExporter

Abstract AbstractJasperExcelExporter class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
See Also:

      Parameters:
      keepWorkbookTemplateSheets - a Boolean object.
